data.body: Fifth review PASS advisory remediation: accepted f78a636a06c2a5e34/ffedd5dd63ca50726/fdd914b4674948113 by consistently naming existing attest.compute_validity. Accepted f083ab9f06bdfc3f5/f0d9495449d2f522f by moving audit/UI consumer wiring and renderer ACs to cb6b. Accepted f993e430465cace77/f039d8fcd97101b96 by replacing overlapping drift-refresh and re-sign inline validity checks while retaining only code-drift qualification. Accepted f3e6713cb566dee33/fc74d039da1bf4e38 by computing health after signature/kind validation but before existing early returns, defining malformed precedence and pin verdicts. Split the compound edge AC and added optional-config fail-open coverage. Rerunning before certification.
